title: Oradea, Bihor — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Oradea, Bihor: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Oradea is a city in Bihor with a population of 196,367. A stunning Art Nouveau city near the Hungarian border, known for its beautifully restored Secessionist buildings, thermal springs, and vibrant café culture.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
